sections.heading: (1) The President shall be paid a salary and allowances at Salary and
sections.text:
allowances
such rate as the Minister responsible for finance may prescribe, by
statutory instrument, in consultation with the Standing Orders
Committee of the National Assembly.
(2) For the avoidance of doubt, the President shall continue to
receive the salary and allowances applicable until the coming into
operation of such statutory instrument as the Minister responsible
for finance may prescribe under subsection (1).
Copies of this Act can be obtained from the Government Printer,
P O. Box 30136,10101, Lusaka, Price K1,000 each
